name: Exhibit Hall
description: Come play pickleball at Exhibit Hall in Stevenson, WA! There are 3 indoor hard courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are private.

name: Stevenson High School
description: Stevenson High School is a place to play pickleball in Stevenson, WA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
